name: Bean and Rice Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cooked beans (pinto, kidney, navy, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a greased grill or electric frypan on medium heat. Alternatively, grease a 13"x9" baking pan and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
2. Spread the mixture in the pan and cook uncovered.
3. Use a pancake turner to cut and remove cooked "burgers".
4. Mash the beans and add all ingredients, mixing well. If the mix is too dry, consider adding a 1/4 to 1/2 cup of soy, nut, rice milk, or whole milk. Avoid thinning it too much; you want a hamburger-like consistency.
5. Spoon about 2 heaping tablespoons of mix onto the grill or frypan for each burger and flatten with the greased pancake turner.
6. Turn several times rather than just once on each side to achieve better texture.
